roa.docketEntryComment: PET & ORDER TO SUSP FEE PER SFBOS 180132 SIGNED AND FILED
/CAL:TO SET APD MOTION TO REVOKE MANDATORY SUPERVISION/X:AFER COURT APPEARANCE, DEFENDANT'S MANDATORY SUPERVISION IS REINSTATED AND MODIFIED AS FOLLOWS:,/CTS:36/

/CAL:SENTENCING PURSUANT TO PC1170(H)(5)(A)/AJW/DNACOMP/CH1:CJ 16M/X:LOW TERM/X:TOTAL 16 MONTHS/STATES/CTS:73/4019HALF/X:THE COURT ORDERS A SPLIT SENTENCE AS FOLLOWS:/X:DEFENDANT SHALL SERVE 6 MONTHS IN COUNTY JAIL AND SERVE THE BALANCE OF SENTENCE ON MANDATORY SUPERVISION THROUGH ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT,/X:DEFENDANT SHALL COMPLY WITH INDIVIDUAL TREATMENT AND REHABILITATION  PLAN AS DIRECTED BY ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT,/WS/SA2:YMCA, 4080 MISSION STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA/X:DEFENDANT SHALL VICTIM RESTITUTIONAS DETERMINED BY ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT PLUS A 15% ADMINISTRATIVE FEE,//COA:40/ICNA/VF4:240/PSR/BKFEE/COLLECT/X:DEFENDANT IS SENTENCED PURSUANT TO PC1170(H),/

/CAL:TO SET/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFTADV RTS:001/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:01-13-12/DISM3/TWS/CONTD:PSR & SENTENCE/DOP/ARBUCKLE/SA2:YMCA AT 4080 MISSION STREET, S,F,, CA/SAOR

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/X:SPECIAL APPEARANCE BY EDRIS RODRIGUEZ, LAW CLERK SUPERVISED BY DISTRICT ATTORNEY,/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/987,2/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW60/LD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING IS 01-03-12/BAIL:55,000//X:COURT SETS BAIL WITHOUT PREJUDICE,/SA2:YMCA AT 4080 MISSION STREET, S,F,, CA/SAORD/CONTD:SETTING/DOP/
/CAL: APD MTN TO REVOKE MANDATORY SUPERVISION/PD/X: PRCS IS ADMINISTRATIVELY REVOKED,/SHER/NB/CONTD: 09-28-12, TS PRCS HRG, DEPT 26/DOP/
